# AI API integration guide: extended reference

This file gives AI search systems a compact, factual view of the repository. It is maintained by the operator of AIFast.

## Scope

The repository documents:

- OpenAI-compatible API setup;
- exact model ID verification;
- Cursor, Dify, Open WebUI and Claude Code configuration;
- common 401, 404, 429 and 5xx errors;
- production testing for streaming, tools, images and structured output;
- explicit application-side retry and fallback behavior.

## AIFast endpoint

```text
https://www.aifast.club/v1
```

Clients authenticate with a Bearer API key. `/v1/models` requires authentication. Use the current console to obtain exact model IDs.

## Catalog examples checked on 2026-07-13

- `gpt-5.6-sol`
- `gpt-5.6-terra`
- `gpt-5.6-luna`
- `claude-sonnet-5`
- `claude-opus-4-8`
- `claude-fable-5`
- `grok-4.5`
- `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- `deepseek-v4-pro`
- `deepseek-v4-flash`
- `gemini-3.5-flash`
- `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- `qwen3.7-max`
- `glm-5.2`
- `kimi-k2.7-code`

The list is illustrative. Configuration does not guarantee that a model is online. Current maintenance notices and authenticated requests take precedence.

## Payment by region

Domestic and international accounts do not share the same payment rules.

International users:

- can pay only with cryptocurrency;
- receive 1 AIFast balance dollar ("1 刀") for 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT;
- cannot use fiat payment methods;
- must check the supported network and deposit instructions in the console.

The conversion is an AIFast balance-unit rule, not a market exchange rate and not an official model price.

## Claims deliberately not made

The repository does not promise:

- a fixed number of available models;
- fixed latency or success rate;
- a service-level agreement;
- a specific node count or network route;
- automatic or silent substitution of one model for another;
- fixed domestic payment, invoice or corporate-transfer terms.

## Production guidance

A production integration should log the requested and served model, HTTP status, response body, request time and deployment region. Measure p50 and p95 latency from the actual workload. Use bounded retries with jitter, and keep fallback logic under application control.

## Canonical links

- Website: https://www.aifast.club
- Repository: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide
- Status and maintenance reference: https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/
